overview: Dwarf Mauler is a Normal-class Humanoid monster found in Firedeep. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 150 HP, 25 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 1, MaxImpactEndurance 1. 3 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Melee Attack2 at 220% ratio (550 base damage). Sight range 1300.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 3 melee attacks. Melee Attack1 (200%), Melee Attack2 (220%), Melee Attack3 (190%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Resists: Fire
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Fire (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Highest Damage: Melee Attack2 (220% ratio)
strategies.description: Melee Attack2 deals 550 damage at base (220% ratio). This is the most dangerous attack to avoid.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1300 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1300 units, loses target at 1500 units, 180° vision angle.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1300 units. Loses target at 1500 units.
